title: Jester sends Bomb to cemetery when killed in battle

card.rawText: If this card is killed in battle, inflict 10 damage to the attacking creature. If the card "Bomb" is on the field when this card is killed in battle, send "Bomb" to the cemetery.

plan.title: Jester sends Bomb to cemetery when killed in battle
plan.summary: Pre-place Bomb on the field, have the opponent attack and kill Jester in battle, then verify Bomb is sent to the cemetery.

notes: Rules text: if Bomb is on the field when Jester is killed in battle, send Bomb to the cemetery.
Pre-place Bomb on field as player_1 field magic.
Do not attach Bomb to Jester; this test verifies Jester's named-card field trigger, not Bomb's equip trigger.
Set Jester as player_1 primary creature.
Set a deterministic lethal attacker as player_2 primary creature.

steps: Verify Jester's named-card trigger sends Bomb to the cemetery.

expectedAssertions.label: Named Bomb card moved to cemetery when Jester died

manualVerification: Confirm Bomb is only sent when it is on the field at the moment Jester is killed in battle.
riskNotes: This fixture references Bomb as a named support card because Jester's printed Gen 1 text names it.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Jester's named Bomb cemetery trigger.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
